query:
SELECT email, sessionId, utmSource, utmMedium, utmCampaign, chronotype, createdAt 
FROM email_leads 
WHERE email NOT LIKE '%petr%' AND email NOT LIKE '%manus%' AND email NOT LIKE '%test%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
